description.unified: Deals Physical Damage to all enemies and knocks them back. This skill is applied as a normal attack.

Deals Physical Damage 3 time to enemies in front. Each hit knocks them down for [2->1] sec and increases Physical Damage taken by [(added) 8%] for [(added) 7] sec. This effect stacks up to [(added) 3] times.
Deals Physical Damage 5 times to a random enemy and nearby enemies, reducing their Attack Speed by [400->12%] for [(added) 8] sec. Against non-hero enemies, deals an additional Physical Damage.

On Normal Attack, fires an additional projectile that deals extra Physical Damage to all enemies and increases your Attack by [(added) 0.5%] for [(added) 10] sec. The Attack increase stacks up to [(added) 100] times and cannot be dispelled. [Activation chance 60%->(removed)]

light.unified: If there is only 1 enemy, damage dealt is increased by 100%. [P.DMG taken by target by 25%->(removed)]

dark.unified: Attack increases by [35% for 10 sec->50% for 4 sec].
Damage dealt is reduced by 30%, but the number of hits is doubled. [Remove ATK Spd debuff and add 3 sec stun->(removed)]

light.unified: Has a 15% chance to stun the target for 1 sec. [Increase ATK by 0.5% on Crit->(removed)]

dark.unified: Damage dealt is reduced by 30%, but the number of hits is doubled. [Activation chance changes to 80%->(removed)]

description.unified: [Roll Over] increases DMG by {0}% on every use and recovers 120 MP upon a Critical Hit. This effect stacks up to max 10 times.
[Miruru Pirates!] Increases DMG by 50% and reduces Cooldown by {0}%.
[Boooooom!] increases DMG by 50% and boosts ATK Spd by {0}% [ (added) %] for 3 sec upon activation.

dark.unified: On hit, gains [Darkness] stacks equal to the number of enemies struck. When [Darkness] reaches 50 stacks, all [Darkness] is removed and you enter [Rampage] for [(added) 10] sec, increasing Attack Speed by [800->48%] and Attack by [20%->25%].

description.unified: When using [KABOOM!] attacks, has a [50%->30%] chance to deal additional Physical Damage equal to {0}% of Attack Power and increase the target's Physical Damage taken by {1}% for 10 sec.
